title: costularia urvilleana
intro: Costularia urvilleana, also known as the 'Rattan Palm', is a type of tropical plant native to the coastal regions of West Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Costularia urvilleana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
